texto: If librarianship is the connecting of people to ideas – and I believe that is the truest definition of what we do – it is crucial to remember that we must keep and make available, not just good ideas and noble ideas, but bad ideas, silly ideas, and yes, even dangerous or wicked ideas.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Graceanne A. Decandido sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “If librarianship is the connecting of people to ideas – and I believe that is the truest definiti…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, ideas, liberty, útil em momentos de liberty e librarian.
